subcodes.first_line: O offshoot of him who in a transport of delight drank of the chalice of martyrdom in the path of God! That essence of being is so graciously confirmed
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ینتمی الی من شرب کاس الفدا بکل سرور فی سبیل الله آن جوهر وجود الیوم در
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @high station of the true believer, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
